title: Open Contact Page from Mass Email Tracking Results Page

posts.author: andrewjrose (Andrew Rose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I use the Mass email tracking feature to see who is engaging with my email outreach. It would be super helpful to be able to click on the name of the users on those reports and go back to the contact page. Right now I have to copy and paste the email from the report over to the contacts board and search for that person. Not efficient at all.

What are you trying to achieve

A more efficient way to go from the Mass Email Tracking → Opened report to the contact page of the person who showed up in that report.
